title: The Piano Teacher
tmdbOverview: Erika Kohut, a sexually repressed piano teacher living with her domineering mother, meets a young man who starts romantically pursuing her.
synopsis: The Piano Teacher is a 2001 drama and romance film from France. It holds a solid 7.5 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2000s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
